column1: # Single source of truth for all skills, prompts, commands, tools, agents, and workflows
# Format: name | category | source | platforms | agent_target | description | install_command | stars
#   skill     - Reusable capabilities and knowledge modules
#   command  - Interactive modes invoked on demand
#   tool      - Monitoring, analysis, and routing utilities
#   agent     - Terminal harnesses and execution environments
#   workflow  - Structured processes for how you work
#   external  - Sourced from actively maintained GitHub repos
#   all       - Generic, works with any agent
#   <name>    - Specific agent or platform target (e.g., codex, copilot, claude, pi, opencode)

column6: Complete TDD and development methodology framework with 20+ production skills
